Name: GRAPHICS_CONFIG_CS_REFLECTION_QUALITY_DETAIL
Description: Determines the parameters of each reflection quality level.

Fields.Name: Enable Local Light Reflections
Fields.Description: If ON, reflections from the player's local light are enabled.

Fields.Name: Force Local Light Reflections
Fields.Description: If ON, reflections from the player's local light are forcefully enabled.

Fields.Name: Resolution Scale
Fields.Description: The resolution scale to use for reflections.

Fields.Name: Enable Screen-space Reflections
Fields.Description: If ON, screen-space reflections are enabled.

Fields.Name: Enable Screen-space Gaussian Blur
Fields.Description: If ON, screen-space gaussian blur is enabled.

Fields.Name: Screen-space Reflection: Depth Rejection Threshold
Fields.Description: The depth rejection threshold scale to use for screen-space reflections.

Fields.Name: Screen-space Reflection: Raytracing Step Scale
Fields.Description: The raytracing step scale to use with the Screen-space Reflection parameter.

Fields.Name: Screen-space Reflection: Fade Angle Bias
Fields.Description: The screen-space reflection angle bias to apply when fading a reflection. Smaller values result in higher quality.

Fields.Name: Screen-space Reflection: Fresnel Rejection Bias
Fields.Description: The screen-space reflection fresnel rejection bias to apply to a reflection. Smaller values result in higher quality.
